retry_reason: The function returns -EPROBE_DEFER when the provider is not ready or module get fails; these are transient conditions that may resolve later, so the caller can retry.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to obtain a phy from device tree via phandle lookup, provider resolution, and xlate. The function performs significant business logic (parsing, compatibility checks, availability checks, provider lookup, module_get/put for provider). The only refcount operations are on the provider module (try_module_get/module_put) and node cleanup (of_node_put), but no refcount operation on the returned phy itself. The returned phy is obtained from the provider's xlate without any additional reference acquisition by this function, so it is not a get-wrapper for the phy.
judge.retry_reason: The function returns -EPROBE_DEFER when the provider is not ready or module get fails; these are transient conditions that may resolve later, so the caller can retry.
